---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a feature or improvement for Image 2 Text.
title: "[FEATURE]"
labels: ''
assignees: ''

---

**Is your feature request related to a problem? Please describe.**
A clear and concise description of the problem. e.g. "I scan a lot of receipts and have to manually fix the table layout every time, because..."

**Describe the solution you'd like**
A clear and concise description of what you want to happen.

**Where in the app would it live?**
- [ ] Extract panel (capture / single image flow)
- [ ] Batch panel
- [ ] History panel
- [ ] Settings panel
- [ ] New panel / new window
- [ ] Background / system-wide (e.g. global hotkey, clipboard watcher)

**What kind of feature is it?**
- [ ] OCR quality (preprocessing, language support, layout)
- [ ] New input format (e.g. .docx, .epub, video frame)
- [ ] New output format (e.g. searchable PDF, DOCX, XLSX, JSON variant)
- [ ] Productivity (hotkeys, automation, integrations)
- [ ] UI / UX (theme, accessibility, keyboard navigation)
- [ ] Translate / post-processing
- [ ] Other: ____

**Describe alternatives you have considered**
Existing tools, other apps, manual workarounds.

**How often would you use this?**
- [ ] Every time I open the app
- [ ] A few times a week
- [ ] Occasionally
- [ ] One-off / specific project

**Additional context**
Mockups, screenshots, links to similar features in other apps, sample inputs/outputs.
